description: rmorie: R-only lite version of MORIE. CRAN+rOpenSci focused; strict-business carve with no Python dependencies, slim inst/extdata, security-hardened CI.
rmoriedata: Bundled open-data fixtures for rmorie. Data-only companion package; no exported functions.

rmorielite: Focused interface for carceral, policing, and public-health open-data retrieval and analysis. Re-exports rmorie's domain API (no duplication, always in sync) plus polite cache-aware fetchers.
moriebricklayer: Reproducible data bundles with CKAN resolution, SHA256 + Wayback provenance, schema validation, and synthetic fallback.
